title: xanthisma spinulosum
intro: Xanthisma spinulosum, also known as yellow betony, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy, downy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Xanthisma spinulosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and promote respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy. Xanthisma spinulosum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical salve for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and interactions.
